sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ السَّفِينَةُ الْقَدِيمَةُ مَصْنُوعَةً مِنَ الْخَشَبِ.
sentences.translation: Stari brod bio je napravljen od drveta.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient ship was made of wood.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْبَحَّارَةُ يَسْتَخْدِمُونَ الرِّيَاحَ لِتَحْرِيكِ السَّفِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mornari su koristili vjetar za pokretanje broda.
sentences.translationEn: The sailors used the wind to move the ship.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَى النُّجُومِ لِيَعْرِفُوا الطَّرِيقَ.
sentences.translation: Gledali su u zvijezde da bi znali put.
sentences.translationEn: They would look at the stars to know the route.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتِ السَّفِينَةُ إِلَى الْمِيناءِ بَعْدَ أَيَّامٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Brod je stigao u luku nakon dugih dana.
sentences.translationEn: The ship arrived at the port after many long days.
